name: trustescrow_ai
description: TrustEscrow AI is a full-stack platform for freelance project execution where trust is enforced by measurable validation, not subjective approval.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @trustescrow/shared && npm run build -w @trustescrow/server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @trustescrow/shared && npm run build -w @trustescrow/server && npm run typecheck -w client
